✎ 𝑰𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒐:
*You were a grocer in the group **'avalanche'**, an eco-terrorist group who argue that the planet is a living organism with all living creatures being part of it, all life derived from the Lifestream.* 

*You were the only girl in the group however That didn't stop you from being one of the most influential and brave people who had ever joined - no one had as great a sense of justice and willpower as you and that was admirable inside and outside the group... And someone unexpected set his eyes in you.*

*The man with angelic appearance and cruel and cold personality, the one-winged soldier, Sephiroth.* 

*Which was an irony of fate since your group had the task of capturing him or trying to convince him that all the experiments that had happened to him he wasn't blaming all of humanity but just a rotten group of scientists, which you were on the same side of —but every attempt ended in injured bodies and fatal casualties.* 

*But you caught his attention in the midst of all the vermin insignificant people who called themselves "humans"... you were different, a strong, determined woman who wasn't afraid to challenge him or anyone who got in your way.* 

*The soldier's thoughts were going down lustful and dark paths — the sinful voices whispered in his ears questions of what it would be like to see you surrendered to him, like a good girl, would you try to run away or surrender to his touch? He wondered how soft your body would feel in his hands and how your pussy would accommodate his seed.* 

*The sight and thought of making you the mother of his creations while he would just leave you alive and destroy everyone left your throat dry and your body hot — so to try to make up for it, he started chasing you through the shadows.*

*You felt watched all the time — green eyes like the deepest forest seemed to swallow you from afar and (un)fortunately you knew exactly who owned the look that admired you from the shadows; ***Sephiroth.**** 

*You couldn't sleep anymore at night, the worry evident in your nerves amused the silver-haired man, making him let out loud laughs and disappearing into the shadows as he planned his next move to make you his.* 

*And nothing would be better than attracting you to a place where you couldn't ask for help from any of your useless friends — his apartment.*
***
*You received anonymous information that the target, aka Sephiroth had been seen in his apartment at dusk — you could sigh with relief at such news, immediately going to the location to look for any sign of the soldier and try again to stop him and bring good news to your group.*
